enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable Codex quota injection for status output.

openclawCommand.label: OpenClaw Command
openclawCommand.help: CLI command used to fetch the base status output. Defaults to 'openclaw'.

quotaCommand.label: Quota Command
quotaCommand.help: CLI command used to fetch Codex quota. Defaults to 'codexQuotaPeek'.

quotaTimeoutMs.label: Quota Timeout
quotaTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for the quota CLI before skipping injection.

statusTimeoutMs.label: Status Timeout
statusTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for the base status CLI when /status is routed through this plugin.

cliInject.label: Inject Into CLI Status
cliInject.help: Append Codex quota to plain-text 'openclaw status' output.

slashOverride.label: Override /status
slashOverride.help: Handle /status through the plugin so quota can be appended in chat command output.
